title: Cogs and Constructs
description: A modpack focusing on DnD styled mods from the world of Eberron, a steampunk style.
body:
A modpack with the sole purpose of turning minecraft into a DnD-Esque game. The mods are based on the Eberron style of DnD, and thus include Steampunk mods like Create, mods like Origins for creating classes and races, and combat mods to make the combat less arcade-like. 

There is a quest mod included in the pack (Cadmus), so this modpack is for creating a Campaign less than it is for playing minecraft just to play minecraft. While there are many mods that players can take advantage of on their own, the main focus is having a quest line, which does not come standard in the pack.
